nasb.text: and they captured and looted all their wealth and all their little ones and their wives, even all that was in the houses.

esv.text: All their wealth, all their little ones and their wives, all that was in the houses, they captured and plundered.

cnv.text: 又把他們所有的財物、孩子和婦女都擄去。屋裡所有的東西，都搶掠一空。

ccb.text: 并带走所有财物、妇孺以及房屋里的一切。

csbs.text: 又掳走、掠夺了他们所有的财富、孩童、妇女，以及房屋里的一切。
